queries.question: Show me all hybrid marketing specialists and sales managers.
queries.sql:
SELECT JobPostings.Title 
FROM JobPostings
WHERE (JobPostings.Business_Profession = "Sales Manager" OR JobPostings.Business_Profession = "Marketing Specialist") AND JobPostings.Working_Arrangement = "Hybrid"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?jobpostings a :JobPostings .
  ?jobpostings p:Title ?title .
  ?jobpostings p:Business_Profession ?business_profession_w .
  ?jobpostings p:Business_Profession ?business_profession_w2 .
  ?jobpostings p:Working_Arrangement ?working_arrangement_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?business_profession_w) = "Sales Manager" || STR(?business_profession_w2) = "Marketing Specialist")) && STR(?working_arrangement_w) = "Hybrid"))
}

queries.sql:
SELECT JobPostings.Title 
FROM JobPostings
WHERE JobPostings.Business_Profession = "Sales Manager" OR JobPostings.Business_Profession = "Marketing Specialist" AND JobPostings.Working_Arrangement = "Hybrid"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?jobpostings a :JobPostings .
  ?jobpostings p:Title ?title .
  ?jobpostings p:Business_Profession ?business_profession_w .
  ?jobpostings p:Business_Profession ?business_profession_w2 .

  FILTER((STR(?business_profession_w) = "Sales Manager" || (STR(?business_profession_w2) = "Marketing Specialist" && STR(?working_arrangement_w) = "Hybrid")))
}
